description: Eternity for men from calvin klein launched in 1989 by the design house has a refreshing spicy lavender and amber fragrance. The fragrance has a cocktail of  jasmine, sage, basil and rosewood and is recommended for daytime wear.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
